achievements: Developed and operated mobile (Flutter) for a blockchain-based NFT gift card e-commerce app
Gradually applied Riverpod focusing on new features within the existing Provider-based architecture, separating state and logic

Designed and implemented core commerce domain logic (purchase, gifting, exchange): Designed and implemented various commerce scenarios including regular purchases, gifting (with message cards), and item exchanges
Tracked and analyzed crashes/runtime issues using Sentry, managing fixes and verification through to production
Deployed test builds and supported QA via TestFlight / Firebase App Distribution (release/deployment management, feedback integration)
Implemented iOS/Android permission and contacts native integration (Flutter MethodChannel) and WebView JS Bridge-based app routing
Developed and operated mobile apps targeting Philippines Cebu local government/enterprises/tourists at a blockchain startup
Migrated existing iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin) apps to Flutter, reducing maintenance costs
Participated in planning and design processes during the initial project phase, refining requirements
Collaborated with the CS team to prioritize user complaints and bugs for rapid improvement
Operated Jenkins-based automated build/test and weekly deployment cycles
Managed multi-department/multi-person (~17 members) collaboration and schedule/issue tracking using Asana/Notion

motivation.content:
During the development of cryptocurrency wallet and commerce apps, I designed architectures suited to data characteristics by separately applying REST and WebSocket.
Based on this experience, I applied to contribute in environments where stable data processing and user experience are critical.

selfIntroduction.content: I led the Flutter migration and structural redesign of Android native apps, performing state management and rendering optimization for blockchain wallet and commerce services. I am a developer who analyzes problems based on data and resolves them in verifiable ways within production environments.

poppop.title: PopPop
poppop.description: Gift Card NFT Trading and Commerce App
poppop.fullDescription: A platform where users can purchase, exchange, and gift gift cards

problemSolvings.problem: The structure was separated by payment providers, causing repeated UI and business logic modifications when changing payment providers, making testing and maintenance difficult
problemSolvings.solution: Separated payment logic from the UI layer and introduced a strategy pattern-based payment engine, abstracting to a common interface to allow independent replacement of payment provider implementations
problemSolvings.conclusion: Enabled response to payment provider changes simply by replacing the engine without modifying screens, improving testing ease and code reusability

problemSolvings.problem: Inefficient paging structure when querying product lists caused loading delays at scroll intervals and decreased response speed upon initial entry
problemSolvings.solution: Designed a custom paging layer based on Riverpod Family and applied key caching, prefetching, and debouncing strategies to optimize data request flow
problemSolvings.conclusion: Improved retrieval performance by 3-6x on average and up to 10x on initial loading, enhancing the UX of large-volume product lists

problemSolvings.problem: In case of Home API call failure due to server or domain issues, the screen did not transition to an error state, and the loading widget remained continuously visible, leading users to perceive it as an app failure
problemSolvings.solution: Introduced 'success / empty / error / stale' state models to the home retrieval logic. Cached the last normal home data in SharedPreferences to display as fallback data during server outages. Also categorized API timeouts and exception types, implementing error screens, stale notification banners, retries, and pull-to-refresh recovery flows
problemSolvings.conclusion: Provided clear error guidance and retry UX when no cache was present, and ensured service continuity by instantly displaying stored home data when cache existed. Completed end-to-end verification for a normal transition to the latest data upon subsequent network recovery

achievements: Provider-based state management, originally designed around the wallet, faced structural limitations as the commerce domain expanded. Migrated to a Riverpod-based system to handle complex state flows and built a consistent architecture

Identified business logic tightly coupled to a specific payment provider during payment SDK migration, and redesigned it with a strategy pattern-based payment engine abstraction to create a structure easily expandable to multiple payment methods

Encountered paging performance degradation and initial loading delays during product list retrieval. Built a custom paging layer based on Riverpod Family, applying key caching, prefetching, and debounce strategies to achieve an average 3-6x and up to 10x initial load performance improvement, optimizing the retrieval of large product lists

Resolved an infinite loading issue on the Home API caused by external payment domain issues by building a local cache-based fallback structure, ensuring data visibility during outages and re-synchronization post-recovery

Scroll lag occurred due to repeated image aspect ratio calculations during home banner rendering. Eliminated computation overhead by memoizing and caching ratio calculations, improving scroll processing speed by up to 11x and enhancing home screen banner rendering performance
Designed JWT and wallet security data storage system based on flutter_secure_storage (iOS Keychain / Android Keystore)
Managed QA build deployment and internal test processes using Firebase App Distribution and TestFlight
Continuously updated features and maintained operation of services published on Google Play and App Store

cpass.title: CPASS
cpass.description: Rebuilt and launched the existing native Android app in Flutter, adding chat, coin trading, and community features along with a design renewal
cpass.fullDescription: Rebuilt and launched the existing native Android app in Flutter, adding chat, coin trading, and community features along with a design renewal.

problemSolvings.problem: The existing native app was difficult to maintain and required separate development teams for iOS and Android, resulting in low cost-efficiency.
problemSolvings.solution: Introduced the Flutter cross-platform framework, corresponding to both major markets with a single codebase, improving development productivity by 200%.
problemSolvings.conclusion: A successful case of transitioning legacy code to modern cross-platform technology

achievements: Custom-built user balance (donut) and price fluctuation (line) charts using CustomPainter directly, without external library dependencies, for visualization
Implemented coin charging functionality by integrating the Next Pay payment system
Implemented KYC (Know Your Customer) authentication to verify user identity and strengthen security
Implemented push notification functionality using FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging)
Designed and implemented an onboarding process using mock data, consisting of welcome screens, tutorials, and tooltips to guide new users through key features and app usage

Developed a reusable chat UI component using CustomPainter and Matrix4 transformations to overcome structural limitations that arise when implementing complex speech bubble UIs with basic widget combinations
Applied multi-language support (Localization) for Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and multi-currency support for USD, KRW, JPY, PHP

brk.title: BRK Foundation
brk.description: A Philippine NGO foundation app providing coin donation and donation amount aggregation features
brk.fullDescription: A Philippine NGO foundation app providing coin donation and donation amount aggregation features.

problemSolvings.problem: When creating custom markers, memory usage spiked repeatedly creating bitmap images, causing performance degradation and marker rendering delays
problemSolvings.solution: Analyzed marker bitmap creation logic, identified areas for improvement, and modified the logic to store initially created bitmap images in a memory cache for reuse
problemSolvings.conclusion: Improved custom marker rendering speed and enhanced map interaction responsiveness by utilizing memory caching and asynchronous processing

achievements: Integrated Google Maps API for a user location-based service that included custom markers and clustering to indicate donated regions
Implemented functionality to naturally render dynamically fetched HTML content from the server into the app UI using WebView, with dynamic height adjustment
Implemented app launch and specific page navigation via Firebase Dynamic Links
Componentized widgets such as buttons, snackbars, bottom sheets, text input fields, switch buttons, and dialogs to improve reusability and development efficiency
Implemented quick login functionality for Google, Apple, Facebook, Line, etc.

digiLab.title: DigiLab
digiLab.description: A blockchain wallet providing overall coin wallet features such as wallet creation, remittance, swap, and QR payment
digiLab.fullDescription: A blockchain wallet providing overall coin wallet features such as wallet creation, remittance, swap, and QR payment.

problemSolvings.problem: When the user's coin balance was extreme (very large or very small), it was displayed in exponential notation (e.g., 8E-6), making it difficult to understand intuitively
problemSolvings.solution: Utilized the BigDecimal class to implement precise decimal calculation and formatting logic, verifying accuracy and consistency through unit and UI tests
problemSolvings.conclusion: Improved the app's reliability and user experience by displaying coin balances clearly and consistently

achievements: Integrated RESTful APIs into the client app for various coin payment processes (remittance, swap, charging, withdrawal, secure transaction, QR payment)
Implemented sign-up and login functionality with support for multiple login methods, including email, PIN, biometrics, Google, and Apple
Implemented duplicate login prevention functionality using JWT tokens
Implemented robust error handling and retry logic utilizing Retrofit and Dio interceptors
Improved code reusability and maintainability by using the MVVM architecture
Achievement: Built a new blockchain wallet service and launched it on the Play Store

sideProjects.title: SingTogether
sideProjects.fullDescription: A community app that allows people to enjoy karaoke online regardless of time or location, addressing the difficulties of visiting karaoke rooms due to COVID-19

problemSolvings.problem: Client-side video merging using FFMPEG took about 10 minutes due to performance constraints
problemSolvings.solution: Improved the system by migrating the video merging task from the client to the server to utilize high-performance server resources
problemSolvings.conclusion: Reduced video merging time from 10 minutes to 1 minute

achievements: Transferred video and audio merging logic from Client-side to Server-side, reducing processing time by 90% (10 mins → 1 min)
Designed the service's main interface: Implement singing, duet participation, real-time MR filtering, and search system
Precisely implemented lyric synchronization for an immersive user experience
Built an easy authentication system via Kakao social login and developed community features like liking and posting
Implemented high-quality audio and video recording and managed media streams

items.name: Survey Analyst Level 2
items.organization: Human Resources Development Service of Korea
